# External Reference Documents

Place external reference documents (PDFs, Word docs, etc.) in this directory.

## Relevant Documents

Key Ministry of Justice & Security reference documents:

| Document | Type | Source | Purpose |
|----------|------|--------|---------|
| Data versus informatie en het belang van context | Presentation (PDF) | MinJus Data Conferentie 2022-10 | Data→Informatie transformatie model |
| Strategische laag (Capabilities) | Document (.docx) | MinJus 2022-03-29 | Domein context structure |
| Motivatielaag | Document (.docx) | MinJus 2022-04-01 | Driver analysis for context |

**Note**: These documents should be obtained from the Ministry of Justice & Security internal document management system.
